# Background

The research stage focuses on collecting grounded evidence before long-form generation begins.[1] A persona-guided conversation can expand topic coverage by encouraging different lines of questioning.[2]

## Persona-guided Research

# Applications and Limits

The research stage focuses on collecting grounded evidence before long-form generation begins.[1] Iterative retrieval and answer synthesis create a richer information table than one-shot search.[2]

polished_article:
# summary

STORM-style agentic long-form RAG can be understood as a staged research-and-writing workflow that benefits from evidence gathering, outline control, and section-wise synthesis.

# Background

The research stage focuses on collecting grounded evidence before long-form generation begins.[1] A persona-guided conversation can expand topic coverage by encouraging different lines of questioning.[2]

## Core Ideas

# Research Workflow

## Persona-guided Research

## Evidence Collection

# Applications and Limits

The research stage focuses on collecting grounded evidence before long-form generation begins.[1] Iterative retrieval and answer synthesis create a richer information table than one-shot search.[2]

## Strengths

## Limitations
